candidate_llm_application: Reasoning-trace transposition cache: canonical hash on invariants (sorted facts, tool calls, sub-goal cluster, hypotheses) + cache reuse across paths + verification key collision check

results.title: Transposition table — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Pure source-domain (chess). No LLM-side mechanism. Only the source-side term 'chess transposition table' overlaps. kw=1, sem<0.7, func<0.7 -> no hit.

results.title: Zobrist Hashing — Chessprogramming wiki
results.rationale: Pure source-domain (chess Zobrist). No LLM-side mechanism. Only 'Zobrist hashing' overlaps. kw=1, sem<0.7, func<0.7 -> no hit.

results.title: Zobrist hashing — Wikipedia
results.rationale: Pure source-domain (game-tree hashing). No LLM-side mechanism. Only 'Zobrist hashing' overlaps. kw=1, sem<0.7, func<0.7 -> no hit.

results.title: SemanticALLI: Caching Reasoning Not Just Responses (2026/1)
results.rationale: Explicitly caches REASONING state (not just final responses) in agentic systems. This is operationally identical to the candidate's reasoning-trace transposition cache mechanism. Multiple criteria pass: kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7.

results.title: Structured Intent Canonicalization with Few-Shot (2026/2)
results.rationale: Structured intent canonicalization for agent cache directly maps to the candidate's invariants-based canonical-state-hash. Canonicalization is the core of the candidate. kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7 -> hit.

results.title: Semantic Caching for LLM Serving (2025/8 v3)
results.rationale: Semantic caching for LLM serving with offline+online adaptation. Operates on semantic-equivalence reuse at request level. Slightly broader than reasoning-trace level but mechanism is the same equivalence-class cache. func>=0.7, sem>=0.7 -> hit.

results.title: Continuous Semantic Caching (2026/4)
results.rationale: Continuous semantic caching with epsilon-net discretization defines equivalence classes over the query space — operationally the canonical-state-hash discipline (different inputs map to same equivalence class). func>=0.7 -> hit.

results.title: Asynchronous Verified Semantic Caching (2026/2)
results.rationale: vCache with adaptive similarity thresholds + verification is exactly the verification-key collision-check leg of the candidate. kw>=2, sem>=0.7, func>=0.7 -> hit.

agreement_with_06_7.notes: Verifier independently confirms 5 hits at ranks 4-8 (LLM-side semantic/reasoning caching papers). Ranks 1-3 are pure source-domain (chess) and correctly excluded. Both rank-4 (SemanticALLI reasoning-state cache) and rank-8 (vCache verified) match the candidate's two core legs (canonical-state cache + verification-key collision check), so novelty claim is broken.
